author: elsatam
description: Extends the features of the core Graph view, display images, manage states, remove links, change node shapes, and more.

manifest.author: Kapirklaa
manifest.description: Extends the features of the core Graph view, display images, manage states, remove links, change node shapes, and more.
manifest.name: Extended Graph

name: Extended Graph

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Add compatibility with Nested Tags Graph plugin
- Fix case sensitive issue for properties
- Fix globalUI not besing reset
- Fix search results
- Fix loading all nodes instead of the one just added
- Option to use Bitmap for performance for links labels

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**Bug fix**:
- Fix issue when trying to get outlinks on a non-markdown file

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**Improvements**
- Added some compatibility with the Velocity theme
- Added local graph support in CSS
- External links are now also retrieved from the frontmatter
- Statistical metrics can now be computed on the undirected graph (some of them)

**Bug fixes**:
- It was impossible to parse some CSS values from theme using complex and quite new color features
- Radial menu tooltip now disappear correctly
- Root folder is no longer showing as `.`
- Dynamic offset should no longer bugs when arrow display option is changed
- Pinned nodes should now stay pinned when changing the local graph

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**Bug fix**:
- Fix the proxy manager which had a bug allowing to proxy functions only once per prototype

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**New features**:
- Drop shadow and text stroke can now be controled via CSS

**Improvements**:
- When a filename is truncated, there is now a default ellipsis added that you can remove in the settings
- You can now select individual nodes by left clicking on them while holding the Shift key (can me changed in the settings)
- Multiple selection modes have been added: replace (as before), add, substract, and intersect
- The number of selected nodes now show in the status bar
- Selected nodes are now displayed in the graph state modal

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**Bug fix**:
- Links between two external URLs (href and its domain) are now correctly drawn

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**Bug fix**:
- When disabling nodes from the native settings filter options, links are now correctly unloaded

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**Bug fixes**:
- Current's nodes CSS style should now correctly be applied to the node when switching between files
- The shape settings no longer permits to move the first shape upward

**Translations**:
- Fixed some typo in English
- Completed the translations in French

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**Improvements**:
- The class `is-current` can now be used in CSS to target the current node of the local graph
- Adding pin icons is now optional, you can remove them in the "Other display options" section
- Add command to invert the selection

**Bug fixes**:
- When fading in elements, make sure the graph renders long enough to see the whole effect
- Fix current nodes size setting not having any effect
- Disabling the plugin in a graph view while nodes are selected correctly remove the border effect
- Only clicks in the graph view unselect the nodes

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**Improvement**:
- When using a background with the icon, there is now the option to use the icon color instead of the default node color

**Bug fix**:
- Background for icons are now correctly computed when the shape is the default circle and there is no border

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**New features**:
- Nodes with associated files currently opened in a tab can now be highlighted with a border, or flicker for 3 seconds via the command palette
- Nodes with associated files currently a result of a search (via the Search core plugin) can now be highlighted with a border, or flicker for 3 seconds via the command palette

The flickering color, as well as the search highlight, use the `--text-highlight-bg` CSS variable (with alpha = 1). So you can change it with the following:
```css
.workspace-leaf-content[data-type="graph"],
.workspace-leaf-content[data-type="localgraph"] {
    --text-highlight-bg: red;
}
```

**Improvements**:
- Layers UI vertical position is dynamically adapted to avoid any overlap with the status bar
- External links can now be opened with 3 different modes: "Always on the web", "First note if exists", "Let me choose"
- Nodes with icons can now have a background and a border

**Bug fixes**:
- Vertical dynamic offset of the nodes names no longer bugs when the arrows are not displayed

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**New feature**:
- You can now choose to ignore links that are not in the frontmatter, they will not be added to the graph

**Improvements**:
- External links can now be added with href _and_ the domain. When the hybrid mode is selected, the note links to the href which links to the domain, kind of like with tags.
- When clicking on an external link node, if a file exists with this url in its specified propertis (default `["url"]`), the file is opened instead of opening the web view
- When using the "Dynamic offset" for the name vertical position, it now takes into account the arcs to avoid any overlap

**Bug fixes**:
- When the plugin is set to auto-enable, save config with states, and doesn't start on the Default state, the plugin no longer loops infitively
- Links should no longer disappear when a file is edited
- External links should correctly update when added or removed to a file while the plugin is enabled
- External links that are too deep should no longer be added to the local graph
- Icons in the local graph should now correctly be displayed when navigating between files
- Hovering a shaped node should now correctly allow to click it
- and a lot more

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**New features**:
- Configs can now be saved automatically when saving a state
- The current node of the local graph can now have its own size and shape (color setting might be removed later)
- External links can be added to the graph view as attachment nodes

**Improvements**:
- Layers now supports labels without a specified level in the property
- Nodes without a layer can be removed or set transparent with a customizable opacity
- Unique backlinks, total backlinks and unique total backlinks have been added to the available metrics for the nodes
- The range of the nodes sizes metrics can now be set by the user
- The state "Vault (default)" has been renamed to "Default state"

**Bug fixes**:
- Icons loaded from various packs with the Iconize API are no longer incorrectly colored
- When a note is modified while the extended graph view is enabled, it no longer breaks the links
- When a property replace the node's name, the name is now correctly reset to the default displayed name when disabling the plugin
- Layers no longer had elements to their containers when they are disabled

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**Bug fix**:
- The file data.json is not parsed if it doesn't exists

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**New feature**:
- Layers. Huge thanks to @secretresponder for the detailed suggestion for this feature.

**Improvement**
- Navbar now wraps and display text labels

**Bug fixes**:
- Pin nodes now works in a new window
- Selecting multiple nodes now works in a new window
- Add support for boolean properties values

And I just wanted to point out the relentless help from @Moyf , @mtx9, @FraYoshi , and @JanB987 to find and track bugs, as well as suggesting tiny or big improvements. Thank you all! ✨

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**New features**:
- You can now pin nodes with `Alt` + right click. The modifier key can be changed in the settings under the "Inputs" section.

**Improvements**:
- You can choose to recompute nodes' and links' metrics (for color and size) everytime the graph data changes. Also, the metrics are no longer computed everytime you change the setting, but only when it's required when enabling the plugin in a graph view.

**Bug fix**
- Deferred view of local graphs no longer create a bug

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**Improvements**:
- Fade in more elements (links and links' labels)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**New features**:
- Option to fade in new elements added by the plugin instead of a sudden appearance
- Add option to color nodes based on depth level, in the local graph
- It is now possible to select multiple nodes at once by holding Shift to move them together or pin them all

https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/f0227120-59bd-462f-a471-0a87c4875034

**Improvements**:
- Unless specified by the CSS, the links labels no longer have a background. Instead they have a stroke around the letters

**Bug fixes**:
- Canonicalization option with Dataview now covers properties (instead of just links)
- When changing the active file, the local graph no longer reload defaults engine options and correctly displays newly added images
- When changing a configuration and reloading the graph right away, the state is no longer reloaded at the same time

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**Bug fixes**:
- Long folder paths no longer overflow behind the toggle
- When renaming or moving a file/folder, affected pin nodes stay pinned
- If the plugin is updated from 2.5.5 or lower to 2.5.7 or higher, the new search filter that is now saved uses the current search filter instead of an empty string

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**New feature**:
- You can now choose to remove the highlight behavior for the links

**Improvements**:
- If multiple types are supported on a link, display multiple labels if there is enough room
- Add multiple commands to the command palette
- Save search filter in states
- Add the option to supports case sensitive properties when using Dataview plugin

**Translations**:
- Chinese translation by @Moyf , thank you very much!!

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**Bug fix**:
- Links of multiple types are now correctly displayed

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**New features**:
- Add the option to import/export the settings as configuration files

**Bug fixes**:
- New text elements (folders names and links labels) now use the same resolution as the nodes names to avoid blur effect happening sooner than the text from the core graph
- When the theme mode is set to match the system, the brightness modificators are now correctly applied

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**New features**
- Add commands to enable/disable/reset the plugin from the commands palette.
- Add a "Filter" section to exclude files and folders from the graph without excluding them from the app other features

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**Bug fixes**:
- Plugin loads correctly when using the Lazy loader plugin
- Arrow alpha are, once again, fixed? I hope so
- Multiple types curves are now evenly splitted
- Arrow color for default links (without any type) is no longer modified
- Buttons are now correctly enable if the plugin could not load because of errors
- Saving a state with already saved interactives no longer delete the settings for the disabled interactives
- When arcs around a node are too small, gap between them is reduced to avoid invalid arc length computation

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**Bug fix**:
- When the CSS bridge is not used, the graph no longer crashes when trying to read styling info

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Public release

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**Improvement**:
- Suggestions for specific color now includes all the possible values

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**New features**:
- Added an option to automatically synchronize the default state with the current graph options

**Improvements**:
- The curvature factor of links can now be chosen
- Link labels can be further customized with CSS
- Supports recursive coloring for tags and folders

**Bug fixes**:
- The selected state is now correctly applied when enabling (not resetting) a global graph
- Multiple type links now have the correct arrow color
- Tags are no longer rejected when containing other characters than latin letters
- At least one frame is rendered when enabling the plugin so new changes are sure to be visible
- Arrow scale, color and alpha for curved links and multiple types links are correctly set
- The plugin now correctly resets if the node stats change and the auto reset is enabled
- Renaming a custom gradient should now correctly update other palette settings
- When the node name is set via a property value, this property value is also used when the node is hovered

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**New features**:
- Link types can now be displayed as a label on the links (with CSS Bridge support)

**Improvements**:
- AND/OR logic when filtering elements has been update to be more intuitive
- Information on how to use the gradient maker are added directly in the modal
- The UI to enable/reset the graph is now inactive while the loading or unloading of the graph is not done

**Bug fixes**:
- Alpha of curved links is now properly faded when a node is hovered
- CSS Bridge is rebuilt when the graph is switched to a new tab
- When a color palette contains only one value to sample, the result is no longer black but rather the middle color
- The plugin is now reset when the active file is changed and a local graph is opened, but engine options are not reloaded
- The radial menu is now correctly centered on the node regardless the system zool level or the app zoom level

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**New features**:
- Add the possibility to create custom color palettes
- Add brightness factor option in dark and light theme for colored elements

**Improvements**:
- AND and OR logic operators are now switched to make their usage more intuitive when filtering tags/properties/links
- In the radial menu, icons colors are now dynamically set to light or dark depending on the background color

**Bug fixes**:
- When enabling/disabling all filters from the legend container, buttons order is no longer messed up
- Fix radial menu position when the app is zoomed in or out

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Fix bug caused by the new settings and states data that will crash the plugin because they don't exist in old settings.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**New features**:
- The number of occurences of a link can now be used to change the size or the color

**Improvements**:
- (in beta) Radial context menu UI
- Filtering (tags, properties or links) can now use different boolean logic (AND = everything needs to be disabled, OR = only one needs to be disabled)
- When unselecting values (for tags, properties or links), you can now use regex expressions

**Bug fixes**:
- Fix using the source size instead of the target size for the multitypes line
- Fix color arrow of curved links with siblings
- Build the graphology only once the cache is resolved
- Dots are not longer animated on links that have the source or the target disabled
- (in beta) Fix CSS Bridge issue when no styling was applied in the selected snippet

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**New feature**:
- (BETA) Add a radial menu when holding the Shift key down and right clicking anode

**Bug fixes**:
- Orphan option is now correctly respected even when filtering data from the plugin features
- When the CSS is updated, the nodes label is now correctly updated too when the text background is enabled
- If both icons and images can be loaded, only the image is loaded, not both at the same time

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Fix a few bugs

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**New features**:
- More advanced [CSS Bridge](https://github.com/ElsaTam/obsidian-extended-graph/wiki/CSS-Bridge) covering path attribute and folder styling. In beta.
- Add option to show only basename for folders, instead of the full path

**Improvement**:
- Add option to use the old horizontal legend layout instead of the new vertical one

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**New feature**:
- Add support for text styling via CSS, see [doc](https://github.com/ElsaTam/obsidian-extended-graph/wiki/Node-Names#css-bridge) (WARNING: removed the setting "use font interface")

**Improvements**:
- Change Legend UI
- Change the threshold and scale of the neighbor nodes when one is hovered

**Bug fixes**:
- Don't color links with the "none" color and use the default color link in the legend
- Use the correct node count function to take into account only displayed node
- Fix arrows being colored with the custom arrow color if link feature was enabled but not the arrow feature

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Beta release to let a user test a feature and give me feedbacks (https://github.com/ElsaTam/obsidian-extended-graph/issues/79)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**New feature**:
- Keep the linked note's title visible even when zoomed out ([e47658a](https://github.com/ElsaTam/obsidian-extended-graph/commit/e47658ace185d0bac9df5bbab26cc3745bb9083d))

**Improvement**:
- Properties now support links. However, two different files with the same name will create the same value, regardless the full path and the extension. ([854191e](https://github.com/ElsaTam/obsidian-extended-graph/commit/854191ed3bb9f8cdc067a3d886e2c02f296a6c38))

**Bug fix**:
- Recording of the last filtering action now longer creates a bug when reseting the plugin or switching tabs ([dd5f4b6](https://github.com/ElsaTam/obsidian-extended-graph/commit/dd5f4b6bdd4efb5e902f19aa390767ec5238a12c))

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**New features**:
- Added the possibility to animate a dot moving along the links when a node is hovered in order to visualize the flow. Feature request [59](https://github.com/ElsaTam/obsidian-extended-graph/issues/59).

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**Improvements**:
- More option for the display of tag arcs. They can now be weighted to have various length, and expand on the whole circle perimeter
- Settings requiring a property name can now support multiple properties in order to have fallbacks
- Legend rows (tags and properties) can now be hidden, depending on what you want to focus on in a specific State

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**New features**:
- Support multitypes links ([6f63a3a](https://github.com/ElsaTam/obsidian-extended-graph/commit/6f63a3afe2d7fa4e8f15f844c42de5f91c92eccc), [5a4b0bb](https://github.com/ElsaTam/obsidian-extended-graph/commit/5a4b0bb16ba4ee3fcbd0f44d0302a543704a9c01), [770b4f2](https://github.com/ElsaTam/obsidian-extended-graph/commit/770b4f235da12beb88fe533a2cb9d57a6cfe2a54))
- Option to automatically open nodes in a new tab ([11c37d0](https://github.com/ElsaTam/obsidian-extended-graph/commit/11c37d04876fa3c6cb7b5bb0c6a60fda05c75e9e))

**Improvements**:
- When a node is hovered, its text comes on top of the other elements in order to be properly visible ([9d2a2b4](https://github.com/ElsaTam/obsidian-extended-graph/commit/9d2a2b48191bac52ef9f2703152b844c8a1ba7d8))

**Bugs**:
- Property settings are no longer hidden ([1658de3](https://github.com/ElsaTam/obsidian-extended-graph/commit/1658de3781c0c88ced1ee4cdc57fb52aa9f7482c))

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**Bugs**
- It's now possible to add properties (as it should have always been)
- Remove wrong styling for suggesters

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**Improvements**
- Sections settings are now collapsible, regardless if the feature is enabled or not ([3e8900a](https://github.com/ElsaTam/obsidian-extended-graph/commit/3e8900ad09bb0c8c842bdec12cead97848dad852))

**Bugs**
- Folders no longer incorrectly appear when a node is added back in the graph ([a2fc429](https://github.com/ElsaTam/obsidian-extended-graph/commit/a2fc429d6820003621646f46ebe9868eb601380f))
- The plugin can now properly be enabled for the first time, even if there is no `data.json` created yet ([1df68ec](https://github.com/ElsaTam/obsidian-extended-graph/commit/1df68ec60031fe09305e997bf101309cf169d43a))

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**New features**:
- Possibility to add an outline to the links ([f89afdd](https://github.com/ElsaTam/obsidian-extended-graph/commit/f89afddda91fe9e9dd856b58773e9eb8f4974c1b))

**Improvements**:
- Iconic plugin's rules are now supported ([89f96bb](https://github.com/ElsaTam/obsidian-extended-graph/commit/89f96bb11859925f08bed2ba549739d9959c6a43) and [9bc6edc](https://github.com/ElsaTam/obsidian-extended-graph/commit/9bc6edcff98bae69872acd7af00702aa09769d8d))
- Nodes statistics now apply to attachments and unresolved nodes ([2772b84](https://github.com/ElsaTam/obsidian-extended-graph/commit/2772b84b512d1a9b1eebd9529b2a4eac2cdcaf71))
- Nodes statistics can now be applied considering a reversed oriented graph (forward links become backward links, and reciprocaly) ([2772b84](https://github.com/ElsaTam/obsidian-extended-graph/commit/2772b84b512d1a9b1eebd9529b2a4eac2cdcaf71))
- Add and improve suggesters ([04eb20a](https://github.com/ElsaTam/obsidian-extended-graph/commit/04eb20ad5a6f3954c57c242fabe1afc11ed8d09d))

**Bug fixes**:
- Curved links now disappear correctly when nodes are removed ([e0111a1](https://github.com/ElsaTam/obsidian-extended-graph/commit/e0111a143ccba98638ad04fdc784c51631350191))
- If a property has the list type and contains an empty item, it no longer crashes ([c6dea6d](https://github.com/ElsaTam/obsidian-extended-graph/commit/c6dea6dd2bcd025eedf97f0ea9a53d7f16d3567c))
- Curved links with multiple types now correctly change color according to the active type ([8f23273](https://github.com/ElsaTam/obsidian-extended-graph/commit/8f23273556ebc0f9a4494aa6c51c479f14899a3b))
- When links are added (because nodes are no longer filtered out), the types map is no longer reset ([38d1ba1](https://github.com/ElsaTam/obsidian-extended-graph/commit/38d1ba1b459cc924ac1c97a31ed309d5da502631))
- Arrows are now correctly colored even if the arrow features are disabled ([2234a7f](https://github.com/ElsaTam/obsidian-extended-graph/commit/2234a7f2e59fefaa91997014e2758c35785cb03b))
- Applying an offset to the node names no longer create crashes when nodes are filtered out ([d1d0da1](https://github.com/ElsaTam/obsidian-extended-graph/commit/d1d0da154bcc79104ebd2f6709d4adb8a283f833))
- If nodes stats can't be computed (for example, because of no convergence), the plugin no longer crashes and instead use the `default` stat ([b861d6f](https://github.com/ElsaTam/obsidian-extended-graph/commit/b861d6ff56f78d72665f3aabc298d959d04741e4))

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: - Add feature request https://github.com/ElsaTam/obsidian-extended-graph/issues/39 : exclude links based on source or target folders

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Arrows are now colored like the links
- Add an option to make the arrows opaque
- Add an option to use the source node color for the forward links
- Add an option to dynamically vertically offset the node names relatively to the arrows sizes

releases.author: github-actions[bot]

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Refactoring, changed a lot how the plugin works. It now uses setData instead of trying to keep track of the filtering itself.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]

- The key identifier for the types can now be set in the settings

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Links can now be rendered as curves instead of straight lines, but it's not perfectly working yet. Still a work in progress.
- It's now possible to select which types (tags and links) will be considered or ignored by the plugin

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- UI display options are now persistent across graphs
- Links now also works for notes in folders
- Tags are now also queried from the frontmatter
